storyInfo: Nasti meets the Tin Man and discovers Maylander's plans to have Rhine Lab take the blame for the accident, and she ultimately decides to shoulder the responsibility on her own. Væla learns of Nasti's conviction and sinks into her own recollections.

attributes.content: The wind blows on the leaves in the young Banshee's hand, and voices fall from the breeze.
(In Sarkaz) One more! One more story!
attributes.name: Convallis Children's Voice

attributes.content: (In Sarkaz) How about the tale of the wandering metal hero?
attributes.name: Væla's Voice

attributes.content: (In Sarkaz) He even graced our valley once. In fact, the mist that shrouds Mist Lake was actually blown from his big pipe...
attributes.name: Væla's Voice

attributes.content: (In Sarkaz) Retract your feather horns like this, and you can shield your eyes.
attributes.name: Laqeramaline's Voice

attributes.content: (In Sarkaz) So we can use them as an eye mask to sleep during the day?
attributes.name: Aefanyl's Voice

attributes.content: (In Sarkaz) No, of course not. This is so you can easily weave your tears into elegies at funerals...
attributes.name: Laqeramaline's Voice

attributes.content: Another recording ends, and the young Banshee keeps her leaves in a chest pocket, yet her gaze suddenly turns wary.
Eavesdrop again, and I'll throw you into the concrete mixer.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: Was that... a Banshee's incantation?
attributes.name: Kristen

attributes.content: Yes.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: You've journeyed thousands of miles from Kazdel to Columbia, yet you record your people's voices to keep by your side, listening to them over and over?
attributes.name: Kristen

attributes.content: Is homesickness hard for you to comprehend?
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: No. But, it's rare I find someone concentrating on nostalgia the same way she concentrates on a blueprint.
attributes.name: Kristen

attributes.content: You're trying to decipher the Banshees' language and behavior. Why? To find a new path, to solve your entire race's plight that has endured for millennia?
attributes.name: Kristen

attributes.content: Gah...
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: I'm not that arrogant.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: I only hope to take a burden off the shoulders of a particularly worried individual.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: I see, though that's pretty much what I just said.
attributes.name: Kristen

attributes.content: So, any breakthroughs?
attributes.name: Kristen

attributes.content: I'm not in that much of a rush.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: It sounds as if you've replayed that countless times over...
attributes.name: Kristen

attributes.content: Soaking in the same old corpus until you drown, unable to develop a new language.
attributes.name: Kristen

attributes.content: The limits of vision and thought drown us in the pool of 'common sense', and then everything turns into so-called destiny...
attributes.name: Kristen

attributes.content: I thought you left Kazdel knowing this.
attributes.name: Kristen

attributes.content: Erasing those recordings... is a cruel suggestion.
attributes.name: Kristen

attributes.content: It's rational.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: Hello, I'm Kristen, Control of Rhine Lab.
attributes.name: Kristen

attributes.content: Nasti.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: The talented Banshee, freshly recruited by Sterleigh Construction Co, who completes projects three times faster than regular engineers, provoking rumors of you imbuing witchcraft into blueprints...
attributes.name: Kristen

attributes.content: We're currently establishing an engineering department at Rhine Lab. Might you be interested?
attributes.name: Kristen

attributes.content: I happened to overhear your chat with the boss yesterday... 'Rhine Lab' is a bio-tech company, yes?
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: Look up, Nasti... Do you see those fowlbeasts, and the morning stars behind them?
attributes.name: Kristen

attributes.content: I'm only looking for some kind of power to break through the sky.
attributes.name: Kristen

attributes.content: The sky...
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: Per your prior suggestion, if you wish to accomplish something that exceeds the borders of common sense, then perhaps the power you need doesn't come from our side...
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: Rhine Lab should be looking into a scientific investigation department instead.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: A rational suggestion. Can I take this as the first proposal fielded by our Director of Engineering?
attributes.name: Kristen

attributes.content: Miss Lunorey?
attributes.name: Council Member

attributes.content: I thought you'd send me straight to the hearing, or perhaps a more confidential cell... but here we are, waiting for a cable car at the ropeway station. Are we to visit the levitation layer next?
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: Your visitor has indeed arranged for that.
attributes.name: Council Member

attributes.content: Long time no see, Nasti.
attributes.name: Tin Man

attributes.content: ...So it was you.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: I just got here, and what a fine place it is. I still have half the place to see—shall we have a look together?
attributes.name: Tin Man

attributes.content: Alright.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: Why is it raining only in the area we just passed through?
attributes.name: Tin Man

attributes.content: Cloud projections, thanks to a sky simulator system developed by Wrankwood. Wait five minutes, and you can even enjoy an aurora.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: A century ago, that fellow known today as the father of projections once lamented to me on a film set, wondering when we could actually shoot a film up in the sky...
attributes.name: Tin Man

attributes.content: 'Sky Fever' has truly set the revolutionary gears of film tech in motion.
attributes.name: Tin Man

attributes.content: Quite an atmosphere here, Nasti. Personally, I take civilization's rapid developments as commonplace happenings, and now I can't help but be moved by the Columbians' creativity.
attributes.name: Tin Man

attributes.content: It's hard to believe you'd still be in the mood for fun and games.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: According to the laws drawn up for Propeller Paradise, relevant authorities must call for a hearing within twelve hours of an emergency event happening to investigate the matter and notify the public.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: Gordon barged into Rhine Lab's Vivarium, wrecked our research projects, and exposed his shady dealings to public scrutiny.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: Evidence and testimonies provided were complete and accurate, your people arrived quickly, yet you've been dragging your feet to begin this hearing...
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: This is no procrastination, Nasti.
attributes.name: Tin Man

attributes.content: Two years ago, the Columbians never thought they'd fight the clouds for the right to dwell above. But now?
attributes.name: Tin Man

attributes.content: Propeller Paradise has become the hottest topic in all of Columbia, and its name tops the special plate registry records.
attributes.name: Tin Man

attributes.content: Take a moment to ride the cable car as it circles around. Look at the facilities around you, and at the company representatives clogging the entrance to the registration center...
attributes.name: Tin Man

attributes.content: All of this already tells us what sort of judgment the hearing will produce, no?
attributes.name: Tin Man

attributes.content: Propeller Paradise. Hmph. You get it? 'Paradise', representing a zealous ambition to fly high up into the skies, while 'Propeller' has an exact implication too—there's no stopping.
attributes.name: Tin Man

attributes.content: A smuggling network exposed, revealed to be led by the chief executive involving nearly a hundred companies, numerous irregularities found in the park's research work over the past six months... once we begin investigating, the exhibition will have to be canceled.
attributes.name: Tin Man

attributes.content: You're right, Nasti. The hearing must convene, and everything that's happened must be accounted for—
attributes.name: Tin Man

attributes.content: But that's all they need. An account.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: And Rhine Lab is the most appropriate party to provide that?
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: After all, this 'sky fever' began that night in Trimounts. Anyone could believe Rhine Lab will do something like this again.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: *sigh* Never the silent technician connecting nothing but cables that your peers say you are.
attributes.name: Tin Man

attributes.content: Though, this isn't exactly a false accusation against Rhine Lab now, is it?
attributes.name: Tin Man

attributes.content: Your mystery 'tree' still floats in the sky. Putting aside your 'botanical unit' and other excuses, how are you going to explain that?
attributes.name: Tin Man

attributes.content: It sounds like I don't even have to attend the hearing anymore. You've already made up your mind, after all.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: ...I'm sorry, Nasti.
attributes.name: Tin Man

attributes.content: I'm not sure of the exact timeframe, but I'll go home eventually. Someone's waiting for me.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: Before that happens, Rhine Lab can become one of the stops on your journey.
attributes.name: Kristen

attributes.content: It doesn't matter if you want to develop a new language, create a new Convallis, or change the so-called 'fate' of your clan... no one will get in the way of your goals.
attributes.name: Kristen

attributes.content: On the contrary, Rhine Lab will fight for everything you need. After all, we have many like you.
attributes.name: Kristen

attributes.content: And the catch? Or perhaps I should ask... the cost?
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: Nasti, I don't ask company employees to view Rhine Lab's operations as some sort of grand undertaking worthy of personal sacrifice.
attributes.name: Kristen

attributes.content: If we want to accomplish the unprecedented, we are already on a path strewn with enough doubt and loss...
attributes.name: Kristen

attributes.content: So, we must never stop. Ever.
attributes.name: Kristen

attributes.content: ...I consent to join Rhine Lab then.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: Seeing as we're still on the cable car, I'm sure there's room for discussion.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: Mm-hm?
attributes.name: Tin Man

attributes.content: The hearing must take place, and everything has to be accounted for, but it's merely an accounting...
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: All of Columbia knows about the Horizon Arc Project from two years ago. Kristen stole funding from the DOD, but Rhine Lab as a whole was not fully involved...though, I was certainly her accomplice.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: Pinning the blame of endangering the entire park on a company versus an individual has entirely different implications, Nasti. Are you willing to sacrifice yourself like this for Rhine Lab?
attributes.name: Tin Man

attributes.content: Sacrifice? Kristen and I aren't fans of the word.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: Everything has a price. This is what life in the Convallis and Kazdel taught me. There is no way I'll willingly take the blame for one of Maylander's plans.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: I won't make it hard for the other Rhine Labbers.
attributes.name: Tin Man

attributes.content: Nor that 'tree', for that matter.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: Do as you wish with the device, but let my assistant take the data, since the research isn't finished. He knows nothing about my project, so don't worry about him tampering with it.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: We're here.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: The agents at the station will escort you where you should go.
attributes.name: Tin Man

attributes.content: Right, there's something else. When I returned to Kazdel, I went to the Convallis...
attributes.name: Tin Man

attributes.content: Væla is here... I already know.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: I had planned to hurry to find her before I went to the hearing.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: (Væla is in the park...)
attributes.name: Tin Man

attributes.content: (Heh, Mercia. So I see...)
attributes.name: Tin Man

attributes.content: I'll send someone to look after my old friend.
attributes.name: Tin Man

attributes.content: Thanks.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: The hearing on the sudden accident on Propeller Paradise has just concluded.
attributes.name: Park Broadcast

attributes.content: Suspect Nasti Lunorey abused her position as the head of the Park's Engineering Department to conduct unauthorized experimental projects, and this nearly led to a disaster.
attributes.name: Park Broadcast

attributes.content: On the night of the incident, the suspect attacked Gordon Tannen, the park's chief executive, in an attempt to cover up her crime with an unidentified tree-shaped device.
attributes.name: Park Broadcast

attributes.content: According to Mr. Tannen's testimony, the suspect not only deliberately tried to harm him, but she also abused her Engineering privileges to tamper with exhibits.
attributes.name: Park Broadcast

attributes.content: She forced her subordinates to conduct illegal tests, deliberately suppressed rival tech companies, and forced dozens of outstanding companies to leave the park.
attributes.name: Park Broadcast

attributes.content: Now, with the ATAO's backing, the innocent corporations implicated in this incident have returned to Propeller Paradise and will continue to contribute to Columbia's aerial operations.
attributes.name: Park Broadcast

attributes.content: The suspect Nasti Lunorey is currently in custody after confessing to her crimes. She will be sent to the D.C. courts to face justice.
attributes.name: Park Broadcast

attributes.content: From now on, Propeller Paradise operations will be overseen by Gordon Tannen and Gustave, supervised by the Maylander Emergency Management Council...
attributes.name: Park Broadcast

attributes.content: ...The highly anticipated Air Expo Columbia will not be affected whatsoever.
attributes.name: Park Broadcast

attributes.content: Madam Væla... was that too loud? My apologies.
attributes.name: Mercia

attributes.content: Nasti... what happened to her?
attributes.name: Væla

attributes.content: Don't you mind that, Madam.
attributes.name: Mercia

attributes.content: Let your final memory of Director Lunorey be when you saw her last night.
attributes.name: Mercia

attributes.content: The young agent places a hand on the old projector and gently turns its dials, as if manipulating delicate strings of memories.

Maylander Emergency Management Council intervenes in all Columbian incidents, in the name of monitoring the emergency measures of government agencies, for incidents produce the easiest facts to manipulate.
The Tin Man always jokes about how the Council's methods are more extensive than Mama John's stocklists, and this of course includes Mercia's Originium Arts—
Erasing memories.
Mercia has done the same actions hundreds, thousands of times. But now, her hand turning the dial, freezes up.
No... at the very least, I shouldn't do this to an old woman with already fading memories.
attributes.name: Mercia

attributes.content: Besides, the facts have been tampered with enough today.
attributes.name: Mercia

attributes.content: A late hearing, satisfied corporate reps, my fellow agents infiltrating the crowd... what exactly is the Tin Man's mission this time?
attributes.name: Mercia

attributes.content: The more people on patrol, the less I can do for you—it's only a matter of time before he discovers my deception.
attributes.name: Mercia

attributes.content: But if you can't stop worrying over Director Lunorey, I'll figure out a way...
attributes.name: Mercia

attributes.content: Nasti... my daughter, I'm sorry.
attributes.name: Væla

attributes.content: It was I... who left you homeless.
attributes.name: Væla

attributes.content: 'Where the torches are lit, the myriad souls be.'
attributes.name: Væla

attributes.content: 'Bones to bones, souls to souls.'
attributes.name: Væla

attributes.content: Let's conclude the funeral here, Væla. Our people have returned to the courtyard, and night is falling.
attributes.name: Laqeramaline

attributes.content: Three months. Demoi spent three whole months in the wooden hut under the Roosting Tree before death finally came.
attributes.name: Væla

attributes.content: I've done all I could, but... I could not alleviate the pain of slowly turning into an empty husk.
attributes.name: Væla

attributes.content: She was never the sorrowful sort. The reed beds along the lake shore would sway to the sound of her laughter.
attributes.name: Væla

attributes.content: But every pleasant memory from the past two centuries vanished completely within the first three days after she moved into the wooden hut. I couldn't retrieve them, as much as I wanted to.
attributes.name: Væla

attributes.content: In those final three months, as her remaining memories abandoned her, all she could do was force out broken, hoarse whispers from her throat.
attributes.name: Væla

attributes.content: In her two centuries of life, she certainly knew laughter in full measure—at least.
attributes.name: Laqeramaline

attributes.content: But why did she have to end up meeting death in agony?
attributes.name: Væla

attributes.content: In these two hundred years since we settled in the Convallis... every Banshee that has left us, has experienced a long and painful period of losing her memory before death.
attributes.name: Væla

attributes.content: A cruel joke, simply put. To the departed, Banshees are the last ones to remember their existence. It is not in our nature to forget, but to remember.
attributes.name: Væla

attributes.content: Forgetting is indeed a new phenomenon of the last two centuries, but you shouldn't blame yourself for a chronic disease we have yet to comprehend.
attributes.name: Laqeramaline

attributes.content: A chronic disease, or a cost?
attributes.name: Væla

attributes.content: Every time, every person without fail, first loses her memories of life in the Convallis.
attributes.name: Væla

attributes.content: As if... the life we created was mere stuffing made of cotton—a substitute that replaced the life we were originally born to live, but in the end...
attributes.name: Væla

attributes.content: When it decays completely with time, the people it once filled are left as empty husks.
attributes.name: Væla

attributes.content: Is that not what we have always wanted to do?
attributes.name: Laqeramaline

attributes.content: To create a different life for the Banshees, the Sarkaz—a life accompanied by song and pastry, rather than war and death.
attributes.name: Laqeramaline

attributes.content: Remember what Her Highness promised us? As we deal with all of this in the Convallis, she, as the King of Sarkaz, will guide our people to bid farewell to our omnipresent vengeful and bloodthirsty nature.
attributes.name: Laqeramaline

attributes.content: You personally told me that Her Highness has turned to Originium for answers... along with that 'Dame'.
attributes.name: Væla

attributes.content: I had a few more conversations with Her Highness after that. She never forgot our original dream.
attributes.name: Laqeramaline

attributes.content: She only changed to a more decisive method to fulfill her promise. If the day comes where her flowers can cover the land... all the more we Sarkaz will need a new way of life.
attributes.name: Laqeramaline

attributes.content: I only hope the Convallis will hold on until then.
attributes.name: Væla

attributes.content: The Roosting Tree is still withering. Its roots have long since rotted. Neither the Children of Soil and Stone's witchcraft nor my own incantations have been of any effect.
attributes.name: Væla

attributes.content: I'm sure there's a future for our Roosting Tree. I only hope... you'll be there to see it.
attributes.name: Laqeramaline

attributes.content: These past three months, have you gotten even a single night's sleep as you kept Demoi company?
attributes.name: Laqeramaline

attributes.content: Her moments of peace were thanks to your soothing incantations, that she could gain respite from listening to the boats on Mist Lake.
attributes.name: Laqeramaline

attributes.content: But what about you?
attributes.name: Laqeramaline

attributes.content: Now that Demoi is gone, the only Banshee left who experienced the war two centuries ago are you and me.
attributes.name: Væla

attributes.content: Only I can pay the price.
attributes.name: Væla

attributes.content: What about the children?
attributes.name: Laqeramaline

attributes.content: Is that why you sent Aefanyl to Kazdel?
attributes.name: Væla

attributes.content: The Banshees' future should be left to the children.
attributes.name: Laqeramaline

attributes.content: Whether our decision was right or wrong, we shouldn't let the children pay for it.
attributes.name: Væla

attributes.content: Is that why you didn't let Nasti join in the funeral rites this time?
attributes.name: Laqeramaline

attributes.content: And good that I didn't. If the Convallis life is but a fragile existence made of cotton stuffing, then...
attributes.name: Væla

attributes.content: Nasti grew up fighting for her life in Kazdel; to her, death is nothing but Originium crystals sprouting all over the ground.
attributes.name: Væla

attributes.content: Her attitude towards death will spread doubts to the other children.
attributes.name: Væla

attributes.content: She has a bright mind. I'm sure she'll understand your intention.
attributes.name: Laqeramaline

attributes.content: I remember when she wanted to build a hut of her own by the Roosting Tree, though in the end you had her build it in the mistapple pulp woods.
attributes.name: Laqeramaline

attributes.content: You hardly bring her to the courtyard gatherings, nor do you allow her to formally study incantations and elegies... How do you explain all that to her?
attributes.name: Laqeramaline

attributes.content: I found the children too loud, so as the 'Custodian,' I had to move further away to find some peace and quiet. She saw how busy I was...
attributes.name: Væla

attributes.content: And she believed it?
attributes.name: Laqeramaline

attributes.content: At least, she said nothing.
attributes.name: Væla

attributes.content: Alright, Laqeramaline. You should go.
attributes.name: Væla

attributes.content: And you?
attributes.name: Laqeramaline

attributes.content: I wish to stay a while longer.
attributes.name: Væla

attributes.content: You've sung this elegy long enough.
attributes.name: Laqeramaline

attributes.content: ...I don't know what else I can do. The Convallis is headed towards decay, and beyond it, the souls left homeless by my mistakes can only weep.
attributes.name: Væla

attributes.content: You can still go back and keep Nasti company at least.
attributes.name: Laqeramaline

attributes.content: As a mother, we might not be able to pay the cost of always shutting our children out.
attributes.name: Laqeramaline

attributes.content: You close the door only to hide cruel truths. But to the child, you're pushing her away...
attributes.name: Laqeramaline

attributes.content: These days, I've been getting the feeling that Nasti will leave...
attributes.name: Væla

attributes.text: But I never thought the day would come so soon.

attributes.content: Yes, it is an abrupt decision.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: A flimsy boat drifts downstream out of the valley, propelled by an old Banshee's incantations.
Reeds sway as a thin mist veils the fallen leaves on the lake's surface. With the season indiscernible, the farewell is bereft of a seasonal undertone.
I had hoped for you to spend the rest of your life peacefully in the Convallis.
attributes.name: Væla

attributes.content: It was my mistake, not finding you earlier than I did. You'd already gone through so much suffering.
attributes.name: Væla

attributes.content: When I decided to bring you back here, I should have been responsible for you. But in the end...
attributes.name: Væla

attributes.content: Please forgive my conflicted heart, Nasti.
attributes.name: Væla

attributes.content: I'm not leaving because of you, Væla.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: ...At least, not for the reason you think.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: Unlike those children, you know how Kazdel is, even now...
attributes.name: Væla

attributes.content: The living still fight in the market teeming with the stench of rust and excrement, while crystals sprout from the dead like untended weeds...
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: It does not hold the answer I want.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: But what is your question in the first place?
attributes.name: Væla

attributes.content: Where are you planning to go?
attributes.name: Væla

attributes.content: I don't know. Maybe I'll use the half-baked incantations I picked up from you, cast a few stones at the valley's entrance, and let them decide a direction for me.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: Leithanien? Laterano? Columbia?
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: I heard those strange names when wandering in Kazdel.
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: Those places...
attributes.name: Væla

attributes.content: They're very far...
attributes.name: Væla

attributes.content: So?
attributes.name: Nasti

attributes.content: Take care, child. Eat well.
attributes.name: Væla

attributes.content: After a long silence, Væla only manages one sentence.
The old Banshee who has traveled far and wide bearing word of demise only realizes now, how unfamiliar those places sound to her.
Her adopted daughter is about to embark on a journey, yet she has no idea how it will end, or what sort of advice to impart.
As the boat gently glides by to the murmur of water, Nasti does not turn around.
Farewell... Mother.
attributes.name: Nasti
